design_context: Hybrid (High-end Marketing pages + Data-heavy Admin Dashboard)

components.button_primary: bg-white text-black font-medium px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors duration-300
components.button_outline: border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors duration-300 backdrop-blur-md
components.input_field: bg-white/[0.03] border-b border-white/20 focus:border-white text-white px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-colors w-full
components.navigation: fixed w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/80 border-b border-white/[0.05]

motion.page_transition: framer-motion opacity and slight y-axis translation on mount
motion.scroll_reveal: staggered fade-up using framer-motion while in view

layout_strategies.marketing: Asymmetric bento grids, overlapping hero elements, massive negative space (p-20+), sticky sections.
layout_strategies.dashboard: Dense 'Control Room' grid layout, sharp edges (rounded-none), pure monochrome utilitarian focus, strict table alignments.

hero_image.description: Elegant side view of a black sports car against a dark backdrop. Use as main landing page hero.

about_showroom.description: Showroom featuring luxury sports cars, Lamborghini models. Use for About Us / Dealership section.

interior_detail.description: Close-up of a vintage mercedes-benz steering wheel. Use for Quality/Craftsmanship bento box.

featured_vehicle_1.description: Red BMW parked at night. Use in inventory/featured.

featured_vehicle_2.description: Dark blue SUV parked on a reflective surface. Use in inventory/featured.

outdoor_dealership.description: Luxury cars lined up at an outdoor dealership. Use for Contact / Location section.

icons: lucide-react with thin weights (strokeWidth={1.5}) to match the luxury aesthetic.
instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure dark mode is forced on the marketing site. Admin dashboard can be purely utilitarian dark mode.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards for the marketing pages. Build custom bento grids with raw divs using the `glass_card` surface styles.
Use framer-motion to create a 'tracing beam' or subtle glow effect on hover for the featured vehicle cards.
Implement Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling to give a premium automotive feel.
All navigation and form buttons must use high-contrast text and strictly defined hover states (e.g., bg-white text-black to hover:bg-gray-200).
For the hero section, ensure the overlay (`bg-black/40`) allows the car image to punch through visually without compromising text readability. Use text-shadow if needed.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Dashboards must use strict table alignments and 'Control Room' grid layout with sharp edges.
